strengths: ~16 years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of GISCollective and active community contributor (talks, workshops, OSS libraries)
concerns: No evidence of director-level IC scope, org-wide influence, or advising strategic customers/partners
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no shipped AI products, no AI-related advanced degree, only brief recent agent tooling work
No clear cloud-platform strategy experience; cloud work appears limited to AWS CDK usage at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and shipped AI products
Principal/Director-level IC influence and strategy work

response.justification: The role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer driving AI strategy, advising strategic customers, and shaping the future of cloud/AI products — it requires recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products, deep cloud-platform fluency, and demonstrated org-wide influence. The candidate meets the 15-year experience bar and shows strong engineering breadth (DLang high-throughput systems at Sociomantic, full-stack at Optilyz, founding GISCollective), but the résumé shows only ~1 year of recent AI-adjacent work (MCP generators at re:cinq) with no shipped AI products, no AI/ML research credentials, and no evidence of principal-scope strategic advisory or cloud-platform leadership. Title progression peaks at Senior/Staff, not Principal. Strong senior IC profile, but a notable gap against this specific role's AI-strategy and seniority bar.
